transcript:
Meeting on May 25, 2026. Project Atlas weekly sync.
Attendees: Feras, Sara, Mohammed, Lina.

Sara opened with the Q3 roadmap. We discussed shipping the radiology module ahead of pathology — Lina pushed back on this because the pathology team is further along technically. After 20 minutes of back and forth, we decided to ship pathology first, then radiology in Q4. Rationale: pathology is more validated clinically and has earlier commercial demand from M42 customers.

Action items:
- Mohammed will draft the customer comms by Friday.
- Sara to update the roadmap deck.
- Someone needs to talk to the regulatory team about pathology approval timelines — we didn't decide who.

We also briefly touched on a difficult HR situation with one of the contractors — we agreed to discuss this in a separate restricted session next week.

Open questions:
- Should we delay the official Q3 announcement until pathology is in beta? No conclusion.
- Lina raised whether the radiology folks would feel sidelined by the pivot — to be revisited.

We will follow up on the regulatory question in two weeks.
